ddls:
CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class or role of the character */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the character */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the character */,
  "alignment" TEXT /* Moral and ethical alignment of the character */,
  "experience_points" INTEGER /* Total experience points earned by the character */,
  "gold" INTEGER /* Amount of gold the character has */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the character logged into the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "armor_types" (
  "armor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each armor type */,
  "type" TEXT /* Name of the armor type */,
  "pickpockets_effect" INTEGER /* Effect on pickpocketing ability (-% indicates reduction) */,
  "detect_noise_effect" INTEGER /* Effect on detecting noise ability (-% indicates reduction) */,
  "climb_walls_effect" INTEGER /* Effect on climbing walls ability (-% indicates reduction) */,
  "read_languages_effect" TEXT /* Effect on reading languages ability ( '-' indicates no effect) */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the armor in pounds */,
  "cost" INTEGER /* Cost of the armor in gold */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the armor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the armor */,
  "defense_bonus" INTEGER /* Bonus to defense provided by the armor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("armor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_armor" (
  "equipped_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipped armor instance */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character who equipped the armor */,
  "armor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipped armor type */,
  "equipped_date" TEXT /* Date the armor was equipped */,
  "unequipped_date" TEXT /* Date the armor was unequipped (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipped_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_armor_armor_id FOREIGN KEY ("armor_id") REFERENCES armor_types ("armor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_armor_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "abilities" (
  "ability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ability */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the ability */,
  "base_value" INTEGER /* Base value of the ability */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the ability */,
  "max_value" INTEGER /* Maximum possible value for the ability */,
  "min_value" INTEGER /* Minimum possible value for the ability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ability_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_abilities" (
  "ability_instance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each modified ability instance */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "ability_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ability */,
  "modified_value" INTEGER /* Modified value of the ability after applying armor effects */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last time the ability was modified */,
  "source_of_modification" TEXT /* Source of the modification (e.g., Armor, Potion, Spell) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ability_instance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_abilities_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_abilities_ability_id FOREIGN KEY ("ability_id") REFERENCES abilities ("ability_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game session */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character in the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the session started */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., Solo, Group) */,
  "level_gained" INTEGER /* Number of levels gained during the session */,
  "items_looted" INTEGER /* Number of items looted during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session during which the event occurred */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., 'Pickpocket Success', 'Noise Detected') */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time when the event occurred */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_location" TEXT /* Location where the event occurred */,
  "event_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the event (e.g., Success, Failure) */,
  "event_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the event on the character (e.g., +10 XP, -5 HP) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_events_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES game_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "armor_modifiers" (
  "modifier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each armor modifier */,
  "armor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the armor type */,
  "ability_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ability */,
  "modifier_value" INTEGER /* Modifier value applied by the armor type */,
  "modifier_type" TEXT /* Type of modifier (e.g., Percentage, Fixed Value) */,
  "modifier_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the modifier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("modifier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_armor_modifiers_ability_id FOREIGN KEY ("ability_id") REFERENCES abilities ("ability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_armor_modifiers_armor_id FOREIGN KEY ("armor_id") REFERENCES armor_types ("armor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the player joined the game */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the player logged into the game */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the player account (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "total_characters" INTEGER /* Total number of characters created by the player */,
  "total_sessions" INTEGER /* Total number of game sessions played by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id")
)
